creator: antonfb@hesiod.org
text: The comments in /usr/src/Makefile regarding building from source still reference mergemaster and not etcupdate. Following these instructions can corrupt system configuration. These comments need to be updated for etcupdate and remove mergemaster.  Probably also pointing at the handbook would be a good idea since this is more complicated now, re: initializing etcupdate prior to updating source code.
